headline: Bullish on Corn and Soybeans? This Stock Just Hit New All-Time Highs.
summary: Corteva (CTVA) exhibits strong technical momentum and recently hit a new all-time high. Shares are up more than 50% over the past 52 weeks. Analyst sentiment is overwhelmingly positive with most major firms rating CTVA a “Buy.” Low short interest and strong support from both Wall Street and individual investors...
